ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no other enrichment

ingredients.text: mono- and diglycerides of fatty acids

ingredients_text: puff pastry (56%) [fortified wheat flour (wheat flour, calcium carbonate, iron, niacin, thiamin), water, palm oil, salt, rapeseed oil, emulsifier: mono and diglycerides of fatty acids], filling (44%) [rehydrated textured soya protein (56%), water, onion, flavouring, rapeseed oil, soya protein concentrate, stabiliser: methyl cellulose].
